_meta.keyKnowledge: We generate, improve and communicate our design ideas using technical terms and graphics, both by hand and digitally.

_source.w: We generate, improve and communicate our design ideas using technical terms and graphics, both by hand and digitally.
y: Iterating on our designs is how we move from good ideas to great solutions.
Technical communication ensures our designs can be understood and built by others.
Using both hand-drawn and digital methods gives us flexibility across different design contexts.
eg: We sketch multiple design concepts and annotate them with technical labels.
We create detailed technical drawings with measurements and material specifications.
We use CAD software or design apps to create digital versions of our designs.
We iterate on our designs based on testing results and feedback.
We present our design process — from initial ideas through iterations to final solution.
We use exploded diagrams or cross-sections to show how parts fit together.
